name: Spicy Brussel Sprouts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heavy, nonreactive skillet, heat oil over moderately high heat for about 30 seconds.
2. Add almonds and mustard seeds, along with cumin seeds and fennel seeds to the hot oil.
3. Cook, stirring constantly, until nuts and spices are fragrant and dark in color, approximately 15 seconds.
4. Lower the heat to moderate. Add the halved Brussels sprouts, cayenne pepper, and ginger.
5. Stir and cook until the vegetables are heated through and the spices are evenly distributed, about 4 minutes. If the vegetables appear dry, add a few tablespoons of water.
6. Season with up to 1 tablespoon of fresh lime juice and salt as desired before serving.
Serves 6
